descriptions.text: Bob's Game (stylized as "bob's game") is a role-playing video game under development since 2003 or 2004 by independent video game developer Robert Pelloni. The project is most notable for the erratic behaviour of its developer, whose quest to get an official SDK for the Nintendo DS eventually escalated into a 30-day protest, vandalizing a store, an announcement of a competing console, and several crowdfunding campaigns, with Pelloni intermittently giving eccentric statements and interviews.
